query:
SELECT 
  u.id as user_id,
  u.email as user_email,
  u.name as user_name,
  c.id as client_id,
  c.name as client_name,
  c.userId as client_userId,
  CASE WHEN c.userId = u.id THEN 'MATCH' ELSE 'NO MATCH' END as match_status
FROM users u
LEFT JOIN clients c ON c.email LIKE '%alvarorios79%'
WHERE u.email = 'alvarorios79@hotmail.com';
